title: Smiley Gets a Gun
writer: Anthony Kimmins, Rex Rienits, Moore Raymond
actors: Sybil Thorndike, Chips Rafferty, Keith Calvert
plot: A sequel to the movie Smiley (1956). Young Smiley gets into more strife as he attempts to prove himself a responsible citizen by helping others, so that he can earn a new gun from Sergeant Flaxman.
